user.title: Set up Helmsman
user.description: Configure the automation helper. Set the Ollama fields to enable LLM improvement suggestions, or leave the URL blank to run rules-based audits only.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Ollama server at that URL. Fix the URL or leave it blank to configure later.
Could not reach the Ollama server at that URL. Fix the URL or leave it blank to configure later.

confirm.title: Fix with Helmsman

abort.visit_panel: Nothing was changed here — apply the fix from the [Helmsman panel](/helmsman). This repair stays listed and clears automatically on the first audit after the problem is resolved.

run_audit.name: Run audit
run_audit.description: Run a Helmsman automation audit now instead of waiting for the next scheduled pass.

review_automation.name: Review automation
review_automation.description: Ask the local LLM to review an automation and propose a validated improvement. Read-only — nothing is applied.

entity_id.name: Automation
entity_id.description: The automation to review. Leave empty to review every automation with an error or warning finding.

draft_automation.name: Draft automation
draft_automation.description: Draft a new automation from a plain-language description. The draft is held in the Helmsman panel for review — nothing is created until you approve it there.

description.name: Description
description.description: What should happen, in plain language.
